source.notes: Wild Fork corpus has 12 merchant-index receipts, but 1356d23f-b0ce-4abe-989b-e123d82b67f0 #2 fails the production receipt loader. The merchant list, summary index, and detail index also disagree at 14/13/12 records.

store_header.notes: n=22. This bucket mixes the large outline WF logo and the large city line. The WF mark is rendered by the logo overlay and suppressed as text; the remaining Thousand Oaks CA header prints about 1.7x body height.

address.notes: n=31. Address and phone sit just above body scale on the clean rows (cap_rel med 1.032, street/city rows around 1.05), so render at 1.08x to preserve the visible top-block hierarchy.

policy.notes: n=11. FEFO policy line is slightly taller but lighter (cap_rel med 1.114, stroke_rel med 0.962); use a modest bump to avoid double-counting OCR box height.

transaction.notes: n=31. Ticket/station/user/date rows are body-style (cap_rel med 0.978, stroke_rel med 1.005).

item_header.notes: n=54. Item/Description/Qty/Price/Total header rows are body-style (cap_rel med 1.023, stroke_rel med 1.038).

item.notes: n=79. Item rows are body-style (cap_rel med 1.056, stroke_rel med 1.018).

total_line.notes: Subtotal/Total rows are plain body on the sampled Wild Fork receipts; the horizontal separator dashes are source OCR artifacts, not a font weight change.

summary.notes: n=5. Item-count / quantity-purchased footer summary is slightly smaller (cap_rel med 0.920).

payment.notes: n=91. Tender/auth/EMV block is body-style (cap_rel med 0.978, stroke_rel med 0.995).

footer.notes: n=11. CAREERS / Forkies / wildforkfoods footer is body-style (cap_rel med 1.000, stroke_rel med 0.989).

barcode_caption.notes: Newer receipts can include a footer barcode and human-readable caption; keep caption body-size.

other.notes: n=72. Residual OCR rows behave like body text (cap_rel med 0.957, stroke_rel med 0.981).
